name: P2000 | 防滑胶带
descriptionEn: Accurate and controllable, the German-made P2000 is a serviceable first-round pistol that works best against unarmored opponents. A pattern using different sheens of silver paint has been applied. Parts of the grip have been painted using a dark, matte paint to resemble grip tape. Hold tight!
descriptionZh: 精准、可控，这把德国制造的耐用第一回合手枪非常适合对付那些没有穿护甲的对手。 采用了不同光泽的银色漆料涂装，握把部分使用深色哑光漆模拟防滑胶带效果。 抓紧了！
